text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Arve, do you have a moment? 
If it's alright with you, I'd like you 
to accompany me for coffee.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
Surely many others would be glad to 
accompany you, why not ask them…?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm curious about that café 
you frequent. I was hoping you'd 
be willing to take me along.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not mistaken, their selling point is… 
their organic blend?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh… yes, it's an organic dark roast.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
They take their time to hand brew 
the coffee… nice and slow.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, now that sounds great. I believe they 
have a varied selection of cakes as well? 
Picking some to match the coffee will be a joy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Today is, after all, your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We should hurry, before the cakes sell out. 
Come on, lead the way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…The raspberry cake does sell out 
almost immediately. …Follow me, then.
